description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this black handbag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials!Height: 18 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 5 cm Made of 100% polyester with a nylon lining for durability and comfort Padded with 100% polyethylene for enhanced comfort and durability One inner zipped pocket and two smaller pockets to stash away essentials Two zippered pockets on the front to store other essentials Single adjustable strap to hang the bag from the shoulder Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand name printed on the front in large lettering Brand tab appliqued on the side CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
